_readme: JSON does not support comments. Use _comment fields for documentation. Never commit real tokens — use environment variable references only.

_comment: Official GitHub MCP server by Anthropic/GitHub.
Provides: read/write repos, issues, PRs, branches, files, search.
Setup:
1. Create a PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens
Scopes needed: repo, read:org, read:user
2. Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your environment
or replace the env ref below with the actual value (never commit it).
Docs: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/github
163 邮箱 MCP — IMAP 读取 + SMTP 发送，基于 mcp-imap 社区服务器。
Provides: 读取收件箱、搜索邮件、读邮件正文、发送邮件。
Setup:
1. 登录 163 邮箱 → 设置 → POP3/SMTP/IMAP → 开启 IMAP 服务
2. 在同一页面生成「授权码」（不是登录密码）
3. 运行 install.sh 将授权码存入 Keychain
163 IMAP: imap.163.com:993 (SSL)
163 SMTP: smtp.163.com:465  (SSL)
Package: npx mcp-imap (community — https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers)
Gmail MCP — provided by Claude.ai's built-in Gmail integration.
Provides: search messages, read messages/threads, create drafts, list labels.
No separate server needed — available as mcp__claude_ai_Gmail__ tools when
Claude.ai's Gmail integration is connected in your account settings.
Capabilities: read_email (Auto), search_email (Auto), draft_email (Auto), send_email (Confirm)
gmail._status: active — provided by Claude.ai Gmail integration, no server entry needed

_comment: Apple Calendar — accessed via AppleScript through the Bash tool.
No separate MCP server. The scheduler agent uses osascript commands.
Provides: read events, create events, update events, delete events.
Setup: Calendar.app must be running and authorized.
System Preferences → Privacy & Security → Automation → allow Terminal
Capabilities: read_calendar (Auto), create_calendar_event (Confirm),
update_calendar_event (Confirm), delete_calendar_event (Confirm)
Implementation: see .claude/agents/scheduler.md for AppleScript patterns
apple-calendar._status: active — no server entry needed, uses Bash/AppleScript

_comment: macOS Notifications — sent via osascript through the Bash tool.
No separate MCP server needed.
Usage: osascript -e 'display notification "<msg>" with title "<title>"'
Capabilities: send_notification (Auto)
Used by: /brief (completion ping), Layer 4 proactive tasks
notifications._status: active — no server entry needed, uses Bash/osascript

_comment: Official Filesystem MCP server — read/write local files.
Provides: read, write, move, search files within allowed directories.
Setup:
1. Edit the 'args' list below.
2. After 'server-filesystem', list every directory Claude is allowed to access.
3. Claude cannot access paths outside this list — be explicit.
4. No credentials needed. Runs fully local.
Example allowed dirs: /Users/leo/projects  /Users/leo/notes
Docs: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/filesystem
